text_instruction: Please move the Client node to the immediate left of the Job server, and shift Worker 4 further to the right to isolate it from the other workers.
Place the 'Sink' label to the left of the top node 11*/4, and change the font color of the 'Source' label to blue.
Consolidate the 'Integration' and 'Wartung' stages into a single final step labeled 'Completion', and change the shape geometry of this new node to a hexagon.
Insert the text label 'Grid A' centered above the main container, and add a new square block labeled '7' to the right of the block labeled '6'.
Delete the label 't' and the arrow pointing to it.
Reorganize the hierarchy by moving the entire 'F' branch to be a child of node 'D', and rename the 'F' node to 'F-Sub' to indicate its new position.
Please delete the circle labeled '2' and increase the line thickness for all the remaining shapes.
Reconnect the 'child' nodes in each hierarchy so they descend from the 'left' node instead of the 'right' node, and change the style of all connecting lines to dashed.
Remove the dashed arrow that leads into the 'E. Fracción de binarias' node, and update the text of the 'Stop' node to read 'End Process'.
Swap the positions of the left branch (starting with the 'h' and 'r' node) and the right branch (starting with the 'a' and 'r' node), then rename the top-most node's label from 'Middle' to 'Root'.
Place a new node labeled $(path3)$ to the right of the $(path2)$ node, and add a directed edge labeled 'next' connecting the $(and)$ node to this new node.
Shift the vertical dividing line to the right to increase the width of the left section, and remove the rectangular bounding box enclosing the bottom rows of the left-hand 'A' matrix.
Delete the 'Chapter 9' node, and shade the 'Chapter 4' box with a light gray fill.
I need to extend the logic in the right block: create a new state node labeled 'F' positioned directly under 'E', and add a transition arrow flowing from 'E' to 'F'.
Insert a new 'Notch Filter' ellipse into the Band Pass Filter group, placed in parallel with the High and Low Pass Filters, and add a 'Log' node connected to the output of the IntPrinter.
Remove the square labeled 'C' located in the bottom right corner and delete the text label '1 cm'.
Delete the black directional arrow and change the text color of the numbers inside the yellow squares to black.
Delete the pink bounding box surrounding the bottom row of nodes, and also remove the 'path[k][j]' text associated with it.
Please rename the main 'Root Concept' node to 'Central Idea'. Additionally, remove the node labeled 'Child 1-3' on the far left side to correct the duplication.
Change the line style of the box 'c' to dashed, and add a new node 'f' to the right of 'e' with an arrow pointing to it.
Extend the top green sequence by adding a new rightward arrow followed by a fourth 'Bla' box.
Shift the label 'b' to the right side of the diagram, and transform the bottom square node into a circle.
Reconfigure the diagram structure by moving the 'End' node to connect to node 1 instead of node 3, and remove the leaf node 'c'.
Delete the 'F5' label located between the top two dataset boxes, and rename the 'Normal dataset' box to 'Control dataset'.
Shift the 'Y-W' circle upwards and move the 'E-C' circle downwards to open up the center of the diagram.
Remove the curved line on the far left and the text label 'text' next to it.
Convert the dashed boundary lines of the rectangle into solid lines, and remove the text label '$A \times B$'.
Delete the 'Solve other scalars' rectangle and remove the 'Converged?' decision diamond that checks the k and epsilon equations.
Complete the counter-clockwise flow loop by adding arrowheads to the connections from A to C and from C to B, and rename the node 'C' to 'Ground'.
Re-route the feedback loop by changing the destination of the curved arrow so it points to 'A2. n = 1?' instead of 'A3. Divide', and set the line type of this arrow to dashed.
Change the text in the bottom node to 'C. Some text' to fix the capitalization, and move the final node 'E' further to the right to increase the spacing between it and the previous block.
Change the fill color of the top rectangular block from red to purple, and reposition the 'Earliest limit order filled completely first' text to be aligned to the left of the vertical arrow.
Insert the text 'HMM Structure' centered at the top of the diagram, and change the fill color of the bottom three circles ($x_1, x_2, x_3$) to gray.
Swap the left and right subtrees rooted at D and V respectively, and change the fill color of the root node A to green.
Fill the circles in the hidden layer with a light orange color to distinguish the processing stage, and remove the label 'error' found between the hidden and output layers.
Color the first node '1 1 1 1' green to mark it as the start, and rename the 't2' transition label to 'execute'.
Insert the label 'Root' directly above the initial S(3) node, and replace the placeholder text 'Some text' in the top-most leaf node with the specific payoff '(10, -10)'.
Remove the text 'New solution:' from the top left corner and change the fill color of all the data points (labeled P1 through P9) to red.
Remove the 's=1' text label and delete the dashed vertical lines on the right side of the diagram.
Add a new node labeled '16' to the bottom-left yellow cluster and draw an edge connecting it to node '15'.
Rename the output signal 'x' to 'theta' and add a new arrow labeled 'D' pointing into the bottom of the first summing junction.
Consolidate the three separate input blocks at the top into a single block labeled 'Read 3 Integers', and change the line type of all arrows originating from decision diamonds to dashed.
Remove the 'ct set' oval located at the bottom center and delete the 'target' oval on the far right.
Standardize the terminology for the file operations by changing the label 'Writes Netlist to disk' to 'Writes Netlist to Storage' and updating 'Writes Results to Disk' to 'Writes Results to Storage'.
Reorganize the disconnected components by linking $T_2$ to $T_3$ and $T_3$ to $T_4$ to form a sequence, and update the text style of all node labels to be bold.
Please make the set labels 'A' and 'B' bold to emphasize them, and add a new mapping arrow pointing from 'b' to 'c'.
Move the 'Phase I' text label to the top of the yellow column, and swap the positions of the 'CO' and 'AT' outcome boxes.
Alter the diagram's logical structure by moving circle C so it is disjoint and does not overlap with A or B, and change the text color of the label 'C' to red.
Please delete the 'production system' text label at the top of the diagram, and change the fill color of the two pink primary xAOD nodes to light blue.
Shade the transition arrow light blue instead of grey, and rename 'Lecture hall A' to 'Main Auditorium' in all boxes.
Change the fill color of the bottom row of array cells to light blue, and remove the 'Indices' label situated on the right side.
Change the shape of the 'Net Benefits' container to an oval to distinguish the final outcome, and remove the citation text at the bottom of the slide.
Delete the circle labeled z10 from the top row and change the text in the third circle of the middle row to 'y3'.
Remove the red arrow connecting Document_B to Document_b and change the background color of the Document_B node to light green.
Extend the diagram by adding a new node labeled '3' to the right of node '2' and connecting it to node '2' with a straight edge labeled 'd'.
Delete the entire tree diagram at the top of the image and remove the text label 'aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa'.
Please change the line style of all connectors to dashed, and add a fourth child node labeled 'one14' under the 'one1' parent.
Change the dashed blue line surrounding the graph to a solid line, and remove node G.
Increase the line width of the long red edge to make it stand out more, and change the label 'HD' connected to it to 'Head'.
Delete the red curved arrow adjacent to the blue box and the green curved arrow positioned below it.
Delete the dashed arrows connecting state 2 to state n-1 and remove the λ_n label.
Delete the arrow originating from 'X_N' and set the fill color of the circular node 'Z_N' to green.
Insert a title 'System States' at the top of the diagram, and change the text content inside the first node from '0' to 'Start'.
Place a new rectangular box labeled 'User App' directly above the 'GDI' block and draw a directional arrow pointing from this new box down to 'GDI'.
Invert the direction of the three arrows originating from Node 7 to make them incoming inputs, and change their line color to blue.
Remove the large label 'A' positioned to the left of the first matrix, and change the line type of the red arrows to be dashed.

Restructure the diagram's flow into a linear sequence where 'Map Tasks' outputs to 'Test a', which in turn feeds the 'Mapper Input Cache', instead of them being parallel inputs. Additionally, rename the 'Test a' block to 'Task Validator' to suit this new hierarchy.
Shift the position of the blue 'PU p' node to the right so it sits directly above the midpoint between 's' and 'd', and change the solid arrow connecting 's' to 'd' into a dashed line.
Delete the grey circle surrounding the left molecule and change the central teal circle of the right molecule to red.
Move the state $q_{010}$ vertically upwards to separate it from the crowded edges below, and change its fill color to light gray.
Remove the rectangular frame enclosing the Thalamus section and delete the text label 'Sensory Cortex'.
Color all the circular nodes light blue to distinguish them as inputs, and delete the 'a' node and its connecting arrow to simplify the structure.
Change the bottom numerical labels from '0.25' to '1/4' and move them vertically closer to the circles they are associated with.
Swap the positions of the 'AAA AAA AAA' branch and the 'BB BB BB BB' branch, and change the shape of the 'root' node to an ellipse.
Place a new node labeled 'T0' directly above T1 and add a directed arrow connecting T0 to T1 with the value 5.
Introduce two new square hyperparameter nodes: one labeled $\zeta$ pointing to $\alpha$, and another labeled $\eta$ pointing to $\lambda$.
Add a bold title 'Group Interactions' at the top of the chart, and change the dashed grid lines to solid lines.
Change the background color of the left node to yellow and rename the text inside it to 'Start'.
Add a new node labeled '7' to the right of node 6, connecting it to node b, and change the text label of the bottom node 'b' to 'Origin'.

Insert an ellipsis (...) in the gap between the directional arrows of node 2 and node g to indicate the sequence of intermediate states, and add the title 'State Transition Diagram' centered at the top of the image.
Apply a red fill color to the square multiplier block situated between B2 and B4, and delete the text 'Type-II' from the bottom area.
Remove the 'AB' text label from the diagram, and change the fill color of the three circular nodes labeled A, B, and C to orange.
Delete the scale indicator labeled '2^-j' from the bottom-left corner and remove the point 'y' from the lower shaded square.
Change the solid grid lines to a dashed style and remove the coordinate label $(0, y)$ from the top-left corner.

Add a horizontal arrow labeled 'Time' at the bottom of the chart to indicate direction. Additionally, change the style of the arrows connecting the observed nodes ($O_1 \rightarrow O_2 \dots$) to dashed lines.
Change the red arrow at the bottom to black to match the style of the first object, and add a text label 'Feedback' positioned above it.
Increase the vertical spacing between the root 'F' node and the row of nodes immediately below it, and make all the connecting lines thicker.
Please add the title 'Imitation Learning Steps' at the top of the diagram, and change the label 'loss=.2' to 'loss=0.2' to maintain consistent number formatting.
Add a 'Figure 1' caption at the bottom center and insert a legend box explaining 'H = Heads, T = Tails' in the empty space at the bottom left.
Add a main heading 'Server Activity Log' at the top of the diagram, and change the fill color of the pink nodes to green to signify they are 'Online'.

Simplify the neural network structure by removing the intermediate transition columns found between the main time steps, connecting the boxed layers directly to one another. Additionally, change the fill color of the top output nodes ($y_{t-1}$, $y_t$, $y_{t+1}$) to light green.
Change the color of the red dashed box borders to blue and remove the dashed frame surrounding the '0 0' values in the left column.
Remove the '0,65' text situated below the X node and also delete the '0,35' text near the Y node.
Change the label of the 'fow' node to 'qux', and remove the red slash mark on the arrow connecting 'bar' to 'foo'.
Annotate the diagram by adding the title 'Input Layer' above the leftmost node container and 'Output Layer' above the rightmost node container.
Correct the typo 'Selecte' to 'Select' in the blue parallelogram and change the fill color of the 'Start' and 'Stop' nodes to light gray.
Add the text 'Figure 1: Bipartite Graph' centered at the bottom of the image, and increase the thickness of the red rectangular borders around the node groups.
Add a header 'Additive Color Mixing' at the top of the diagram, and change the label 'magenta' to read 'purple'.
Change the red fill color of the matrix cells to blue, and remove the label 'a_{1n}' from the top-right cell.
Draw a bracket labeled 'Y' above the left grid to match the style of the right grid, and insert the text '$a_{24}$' into the red highlighted cell in the second row of matrix A.
Change the shape of the 'Q =' block to a rounded rectangle to indicate it is a decision node, and remove the block containing '$\dot{\Omega} =$' since it appears incomplete.
Add a text label reading 'Source: Rapport 2023' at the bottom of the canvas. Additionally, update the text in the bottom-right oval to correct 'alimentire' to 'alimentaire'.
Set the fill color of the node containing the value 40 to yellow, and remove the text label 'prev' from the diagram.
Remove the red node labeled '$s_{24}$' located at the bottom of the third column, and rename the green node '$s_{23}$' directly above it to '$s_{check}$'.
Move the rightmost column of nodes further to the right to increase the spacing, and change the fill color of all the nodes to light green.
Remove the 'Anger' node from the top path and delete the 'Gratitude' node from the bottom path.
Add a title 'Logical Layout' above the small colored grid in the bottom left, and also insert a label reading 'Free Memory' underneath the range of empty cells from 111 to 116.
Convert the three top-level rounded rectangular nodes into circles, and update the 'main 4' label in the middle column to read 'main 5'.
Get rid of the blue arc jumping from node s to node x, and also remove the 'r' label sitting on top of the node with the infinity symbol.
Color the three top nodes (x1, x2, x3) with a light green fill, and delete the arrow pointing from y2 to x3.
Transform the network into an undirected graph by removing all the arrowheads, and increase the line width of all connecting edges to make them bolder.
Reverse the direction of all arrows in the diagram to show the backward flow, and change the color of the edge labeled '5' to blue.
Remove the bottom section illustrating the input and output bits along with the green arrows, and change the blue transition lines to a dashed line type.
Change the fill color of the nodes to blue and remove the probability annotations from the arrows.
Remove the horizontal double-headed arrow connecting 'JP' and 'R' in the MNAR diagram, and also delete the diagonal arrow pointing from 'R' to 'IQ' in the NAR diagram.
Remove the node containing '2,5' to prune that branch, and also delete the label '2,6|3' from the top connecting line.
Reorient the entire diagram by transposing the row vectors P, Q, and the result into vertical column vectors, and change the connecting curved arrows to dashed lines.
Move the result vector further to the right to create more empty space, and change the style of the curved arrows to be dashed lines.
Insert a child node 'k' connected to 'g' in the right tree, and remove the green line segment located on the far right.
Add a curved double-headed arrow connecting the error terms e1 and e2, and add a title 'Measurement Model' at the top of the diagram.
Delete the vertical arrow labeled '1' that points upward from the bottom node, and remove the self-loop arrow labeled '3' on top of the uppermost node.
Change the green fill in the active cells to a purple shade and remove the index numbers under the bottom array.
Merge the left branch into the middle branch by moving all 'A' nodes to list under the center 'text' node, and change that center node's fill color to yellow.
Remove the text label $(x, y)$ from the diagram and change the text content of the label $(x', y')$ to $P'$.
Reverse the order of the rows so that the list starts with 'Bernstein (Ball)' and ends with 'Plain ISD', and change the text style of all the algorithm labels on the left to be bold.
Shift the 'First level', 'Second Level', and 'Third level' labels to the left side of the tree, and change the text color of the root node '1' to blue.
Delete the bottom rectangle labeled 'items' and correct the spelling of 'ittem3' to 'item3'.
Change the red border color of the central node $t_i$ to blue, and remove the probability label $P(k=i-2|\lambda=i)$ located at the bottom left.
Shift the label 'f_1' above the central column vertically upwards to increase spacing, and reposition the output labels y_1, y_2, and y_R to be inside their respective output rectangles.
Add a new small pink node labeled 'c' connected to the central top node B, and change the fill color of the large green node C to orange.
Add a large title 'The Dual Court System' centered at the very top of the image, and change the fill color of the 'State Supreme Court' box to orange.

Reverse the direction of all arrows in the diagram to depict a top-down chain of command rather than an appeals process, and change the fill color of the 'The Supreme Court' box to gold to make it stand out.
Convert all the rectangular nodes into circular shapes and remove the node labeled 'D' from the diagram.
Remove the caption 'Figure 1: This is for test' found at the bottom, and also delete the rightmost node labeled 'F'.
Highlight the N1 through N5 boxes by changing their fill color to light blue, and delete the green dashed lines connecting the main block to the bottom summary row.
Delete the black circle situated in the fourth column of the top row, and also remove the black circle found in the first column of the fourth row.
Delete the large yellow background rectangle and remove the thin red lines centered within the blue arrows.
Remove the blue 'Filling a cup with water' heading box and correct the typo in the final step to 'Grab a glass.'.
Invert the logical flow of the first decision diamond by swapping the targets of its 'ja' and 'nein' branches, and change the line color of all connecting arrows in the flowchart to blue.
Please make the arrows from the input layer to the first hidden layer dashed, and change the 'Output layer' title to 'Results'.
Insert the main title 'Zoonotic Transmission Pathways' at the top center of the image, and add a text annotation 'Viral Shedding' next to the dashed arrow linking the top box to the lower-left box.
I need this to look more like a block diagram. Can you change the circles to squares? Also, get rid of the text at the bottom.
Delete the box containing the ellipsis '....' from the 'Outer box 7' row, and remove the entire dashed container labeled 'Outer box 6'.
Delete the leftmost gray box with the letter A and the arrow immediately to its right.
Insert a new circular node labeled '(0)' to the left of node '(1)', and draw a blue dashed arrow pointing from this new node to node '(1)'.
Delete the connection line between the top green input node ($I_1$) and the top red hidden node ($H_1$), and also remove the 'Figure 1: Caption' text at the bottom.
Delete the 'Answer 4' node and remove the 'Theory B' box from the diagram.
Move the label 'S' to the top-left corner of the red region to avoid clutter, and increase the line width of all arrows connected to the '$B_{DP}$' node to emphasize that path.
Remove the header label '$A_3$' from the top of the third column and delete the vertical ellipsis symbol inside that same column.
Remove the node U31 and delete the edge between U13 and U23.
Eliminate the bottom horizontal line and delete the entire column E from the table.
Delete the point labeled E situated near the center and the point labeled I at the top of the diagram.
Label the arrow originating from point D as 'v', and change the line type of the large circle from dashed to solid.
Change the alignment of the text in the outermost gray box to be right-aligned, and move the innermost white box to sit below the 'Even more text test' label.
Align the entire process horizontally by positioning the 'Tuple3' group to the right of the 'Tuple2' group, and change the text label 'Tuple3' to 'Final Tuple'.
Update the text in the first box to 'Start' and change its fill color to green.
Move the linked lists on the right further away from the main column and increase the vertical space separating the upper set of lists from the lower set.

Simplify the process flow by merging the 'Design' and 'Implementation & Test' arrows (along with the 'Q' diamond between them) into a single unified arrow labeled 'Development Phase', and correct the spelling in the third arrow from 'Aceptance test' to 'Acceptance test'.
Exchange the positions of the 'n' and 'm' cells in the top row and update the middle cell's text to 'Value'.
Make the arrows connecting the Reader and Tag significantly thicker to emphasize the data transmission, and remove the top title box 'Scenario Setup' to save vertical space.
Convert the 'Projet Fish & Chips' node shape into a rectangle with sharp corners, and remove the 'Respecter les exigences physiques du capteur' node.
Delete the upper diagram from the image, and in the remaining lower diagram, change the text 'Goal' to 'Main Objective'.
Delete the self-referencing loop on State 2 and make all the connecting arrows thicker to improve visibility.
Delete the long curved arrow at the bottom that points from node N back to node 0, and change the text color of the label '0' inside the first node to red.
Delete the title text 'm-way Search Tree' at the top left and remove the navigation control icons at the bottom right.
Please move the 'P' node to the right side of the 'U' node to save vertical space, and change the connecting line from 'H' to 'P' into a dashed style.
Please add a new diamond-shaped state labeled '5' to the right of state '4' and connect state '4' to it with a new arrow.
Remove the curly braces situated next to the 'Fold' labels on the left, and rename the text in the blue boxes from 'Validation' to 'Test'.
Delete the 'blablabla.py' text entry from the Data preprocessing container and remove the circular arrow icon found inside the Finetuning container.
Please remove the curly brace labeled $R_i$ on the right side of the matrix and also delete the curly brace labeled $R_g$ at the bottom.
Bring the label "$P^T$" vertically closer to the bottom edge of its grid, and change the highlight color of the cells in the leftmost matrix from yellow to light green.

Expand the underlying model structure to represent four latent factors by adding a new column to the Q matrix and a new row to the P^T matrix, and change the fill color of the populated cells in the R matrix from yellow to light green.
Convert the dashed arrow pointing from C to F into a solid line, and add the label 'Optional' above the dashed arrow connecting D to G.
Change the orange text label 'Controller' to 'Plant Process' and add a disturbance arrow labeled '$d(t)$' pointing to the input of the Plant block.
Relocate the text label 'Active User' to the right side of the highlighted row, and change the fill color of that row from orange to light green.
Reverse the direction of all the arrows in the diagram to indicate a return flow, and change the fill color of the two large circles to black.
Add a vertical connecting line between node $X_1^2$ and node $X_2^2$, and remove the question mark symbol '?' located between the first two nodes of the first column.
Change the solid vertical line connecting nodes $X_1^1$ and $X_2^1$ to a dashed line style, and remove the question mark symbol located next to it.
Add a text label 'No' next to the arrow connecting the 'Changed?' diamond to the 'End' node, and rename the 'Python Scraper' block to 'Data Ingestion'.
Remove the curly brace and the 'Omega =' text label on the right side of the diagram.
Relocate the 'Unmixing System' text to be centered inside the green rectangle, and change the rectangle's fill color to a light blue shade.
Reverse the direction of all arrows in graph (e) to reflect the inverse relationship, and change the line style of these arrows to dashed.
Expand the tree structure by adding a new branch from the top triangle to a new circular node labeled '2.0' on the right side, and change the text color of the top triangle's label to red.
Replace the text '$w_{t0}$' in the yellow node with '$w_{target}$' and remove the figure caption at the bottom.
Delete the node labeled s4 from the top timeline and remove the dashed arrow that curves from s6 back to s1.
Change the fill color of node u3 to green to match its neighbors, and remove the dashed container surrounding node v1.
Swap the positions of nodes A and B at the top of the diagram, and change the border color of the central node D to red.
Place a label reading 'Input' centered below the large grid on the left, and add a label reading 'Output' centered below the grid on the right.
Bring the 'State' box closer to the green input layer nodes to reduce the connection length, and move the 'Environment' box vertically upwards to tighten the overall layout.
Move the label '3.4' so that it is positioned below the line segment AH, and change the fill color of node H to red.
Apply a pale yellow background fill to all the rectangular boxes in the diagram. Additionally, correct the spelling error 'Costtrutivo' to 'Costruttivo' in every node where it appears.
Add a text label 'Past' centered above the left branching tree and a text label 'Future' centered above the right branching tree.
Insert a new square node labeled '0' to the left of node '1', and connect '0' and '1' with a pair of bidirectional arrows.
Remove all the coordinate text labels from the grid cells to declutter the diagram, and increase the line width of the red path to make it more prominent.
Transform the graph into a cylinder by connecting node 5 to node 8 and node 6 to node 7, and change the label 'U' to 'Cylinder'.
Add a vertical red line connecting node 5 to node 6, and add another vertical red line connecting node 8 to node 7.
Remove the 'database' box from the diagram and change the fill color of the 'slurmctld' circle to red.
Remove the grey shading from the $x_i$ node, and change the top beige background area to white.
Change the line style of the x and y axes to dashed, and remove the text labels A, B, C, and D from the boxes.
Rename the 'Video decoder' to 'Decoder' and the 'Video encoder' to 'Encoder' to simplify the block labels.
Change the text label 'Filter' to 'Bandpass' and rename the 'Angle' block to 'Phase'.
Change the solid lines connecting the last hidden layer to the output node into dashed lines, and remove the text label 'Input #5'.
Convert the red square nodes x, y, and z into circles and remove the long red arrow positioned above them.

Alter the simulation logic by rerouting the feedback arrow from the 'update model' block to point back to the 'Simulate the individual sub-systems' step instead of 'Calculate derivatives', and correct the typo 'setpoins' to 'setpoints' in the 'Call the initial setpoints...' block.
Delete the 'Second' block from the diagram and remove the 'No' text label from the feedback loop.
Label the edge connecting node 0 and node 6 as '$s_3$' and add a new node 13 attached to node 7 with an orange edge.
Reorganize the left graph by reversing the direction of all its arrows to depict a bottom-up flow, and change the fill color of the root nodes in both graphs to yellow to highlight them.
Add the label 'i' next to the middle curved arrow in group B, and change the text content of the 'br2' box to 'Input 2'.
Add a 'Head' arrow pointing to the first mapping node labeled '0' and change the fill color of the 'tail' box to match the orange mapping blocks.
Remove the text headers indicating the 'Input', 'Hidden', and 'Output' layers, and delete the numerical weight values from the connecting arrows.
Place a text label 'System Diagram v1.0' at the top left of the image, and rename the 'Processing' block to 'Data Processing'.
Please move the labels 'flow 1 label' and 'flow 2 label' to the top of the diagrams, and swap the order of 'Feature extraction' and 'Feature selection' in the left flowchart.
Swap the vertical positions of the Q1 and Q2 rows so Q2 appears at the top, and remove the '??' label from the bottom left.
Change the geometry of the central node a1 from a circle to a square to represent a switch, and remove the unconnected node a12 located in the bottom left.

Change the data representation of all transition labels from column vectors to linear tuples (e.g., '(0,1,1)') to save vertical space, and increase the line width of all transition arrows for better visibility.
Please delete the curved arrow connecting node 1 to node $t_{max}$, and also remove the probability label '1' located underneath the straight arrow between node 2 and node 1.
Insert a new circular node labeled 'D' connected to node 'C', and update the text content of node 'B' to read 'Root'.
Fill the 'SA' node with a light blue color to match the blue indicator in its adjacent box, and remove the small rectangular grid displayed next to the 'T' node.
Insert a right-pointing arrow between structure (A) and structure (B) to depict the transition, and add a title 'Feature Decomposition' at the top center.
Change the style of the three arrows connecting the inputs to the central node to be dashed lines, and add a title text 'Perceptron Model' at the top of the diagram.
Spread the three input nodes vertically to increase the space between them, and reposition the weight labels ($w_1, w_2, w_3$) to the underside of the arrows.
Add the text label 'Buckets' above the column of indices on the left side. Additionally, change the arrow connecting index 0 to the right-side block to be a dashed line.
Change the red arrows to a dashed line style to better represent the division steps, and highlight the starting array at the top by changing its fill color to gold.
Move the three white nodes on the right side further to the right to increase the gap between the groups, and change their fill color to light blue.
Reduce the vertical gap between the row of register cells and the feedback path below to make the diagram more compact, and change the text color of all the labels inside the boxes to blue.
Convert the shape of all the tree nodes from circles to squares, and remove the curved green arrow that forms a loop on block B2.
Insert a main title 'Fluxo de Egressos do Ensino Médio' at the top of the diagram and add a legend in the bottom left corner indicating that dashed arrows represent 'Fluxo Indireto'.
Color the horizontal lines connecting the nodes red and delete the rectangular box enclosing the diagram.
Change the fill color of the large dashed containers for 'Type 1 System' and 'Type 2 System' to a light gray, and rename the 'Start' node to 'Initiate'.
Change the shape of the 'Methane' block to an ellipse, and remove the right-most 'Hydrogen' block labeled 's5'.
Add a text label 'Start' above the top-most grid, and change the background fill color of that grid to light blue to highlight the initial state.

Prune the diagram's structure by removing the entire right-hand branch, including the intermediate parent node and its three leaf nodes. Then, change the text color of all the numbers in the remaining left-hand branch to blue.
Please change the dashed horizontal arrows pointing to the 'commande' boxes into solid lines, and remove the diagonal arrow labeled 'décomposition' from the diagram.
Connect the grids to show progression by adding an arrow pointing from the first grid to the second, and another arrow pointing from the second grid to the third.
